title: Soyapango Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Soyapango, with a Z-Score of +4.77. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Soyapango is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 15.7 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 39% and the wind speed is at 10.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
